parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { checks: ($json.agent_checks || []).filter(c => c && c.agent_email && c.datetime).map(c => ({ agent_email: c.agent_email, datetime: c.datetime })) } }}

={{ { ticket_id: $node["Build Transcript"].json.ticket_id, status: "success", score: $json.output.audit_summary.overall_score, audit_response: JSON.stringify($json.output), audit_type: $node["Build Transcript"].json.audit_type || 'full' } }}
